response.justification: Mohammed has extensive full-stack experience (13+ years), with deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java, PostgreSQL/MongoDB). His roles demonstrate strong architecture skills, scalability focus (handling millions of requests), and leadership in AI-agent infrastructure. While his resume highlights diverse languages (D, C++, Swift), his alignment with the core stack and modern practices (TDD, CI/CD) makes him an excellent fit. Concerns are minor: limited direct Vitest experience and a brief gap in recent formal employment.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack development with direct experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong architecture and scalability expertise, including handling high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec) and AI-agent infrastructure
Proven leadership in developer tooling, OSS contributions, and mentorship (e.g., Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Vitest (though Jest expertise suggests adaptability)
Recent employment history shows a short gap (April 2025–present at re:cinq may be a recent move)
Diverse language experience (D, C++, Swift) could indicate a lack of depth in the core stack, though his recent roles focus heavily on TypeScript/JavaScript

key_factors.factor: Architecture and scalability expertise (high-throughput systems, AI agents)
Testing framework expertise (Jest, Selenium, TDD practices)
